violations.text: Ice bin in event space is lacking an airgap. New Violation. Correct By: 03/19/2026

Protective shielding is not provided for several light fixtures in the event space kitchen. Light bulbs must be shielded, coated, or otherwise shatter-resistant in areas where there is exposed food; clean equipment, utensils, and linens; or unwrapped single-service and single-use articles. New Violation. Correct By: 03/19/2026

Spray bottles used for storing chemicals taken from bulk supplies were not marked with the common name of the chemical. Spray bottles were labeled at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/19/2024

The non-food contact surfaces of the ice machine have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Non-food contact surfaces must be cleaned to sight and touch. New Violation. Correct By: 11/20/2024

The receptacle in the women's toilet room is lacking a cover. A toilet room used by females shall be provided with a covered receptacle for sanitary napkins. Establishment is to obtains covers for receptacles. New Violation. Correct By: 11/26/2024

The floors under the cook line and under equipment in the event kitchen area has an accumulation of soil residue and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 11/26/2024
